questions.question: A population of birds has a beak size that is normally distributed with a mean of 10 cm and a standard deviation of 1 cm. If the population is under selection pressure to have larger beaks, what will be the result on the population's beak size distribution?

options.A: The mean will increase, but the standard deviation will remain the same
options.B: The mean will decrease, but the standard deviation will remain the same
options.C: The mean will increase, and the standard deviation will also increase
options.D: The mean will remain the same, but the standard deviation will decrease
